stonetop.summary: A house-sized fae bear-lord of winter, ruling by hoarded debts.

system.concept: A house-sized fae bear-lord of winter, ruling by hoarded debts.
system.description: When winter snows blanket the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.6kt1b8ozEREDCi4k]{Great Wood}, the Bear roams the land — most often met as a great and snuffling beast, big as a house, icicles clinging to his fur, his nervous retinue trailing discreetly, waiting on his call. He is among the most powerful of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.Ej5WiMs30baKNXW3]{Fae}: he snapped his own master's neck, gobbled down the corpse, freed hundreds of Fae from servitude, then leveraged the debts they owed him to become a feudal lord. His domain is a great cave of hoarded riches, with many entrances — each leading to a different cave mouth in the world, but only when that mouth is ringed with snow. He is one of the Four Chieftains.
